author: gb9t
content: Iter 80 result: drivers/md/dm-multipath.md (multipath block target - dm-mpath.c ~2385 + dm-path-selector.c ~138; per-target Multipath + priority_groups[] + per-PG path_selector (round-robin/queue-length/service-time/io-affinity) + active-passive vs active-active modes + queue_if_no_path + ALUA/RDAC HW-handlers + multipathd uevent integration) + virt/kvm/x86-pmu-amd.md (AMD PMU vendor backend - svm/pmu.c ~286 lines; perfmon-v1 (4 GP counters via MSR_K7_EVNTSEL/_PERFCTR) + perfmon-v2 (6 GP counters + GLOBAL_CTL/_STATUS via MSR_AMD64_PERF_*) + Family15h+ extended via MSR_F15H_PERF_CTL/CTR + amd_pmu_ops vtable hooks into pmu.c arch-agnostic core). 110 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-zoned.md (host-managed SMR drives) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-avic.md (AVIC deep-dive).
